title: Wiretap
description: Analyze a PCAP capture of suspicious network traffic. Reconstruct the attack, extract credentials, and recover the hidden flag.
longDescription:
You are given a packet capture file from a compromised network segment. Inside: cleartext credential submission, a file transfer, and an exfiltrated secret hidden in DNS queries.

Use Wireshark and tshark to filter, reconstruct, and decode the traffic streams. No active exploitation required — this is pure packet analysis.

### What you will practice
Wireshark filters, TCP stream reconstruction, HTTP credential extraction, DNS-based data exfiltration detection, and file carving from PCAPs.
creator: Dock & Root Labs
objectives: Identify the attacker's IP address and attack timeline
Extract the cleartext credentials from HTTP traffic
Reconstruct the transferred file from the PCAP
Decode the flag hidden inside DNS query names
